summary: Netflix-grade Autoplay Preview System with Blurhash VERIFIED - ALL 21 BACKEND TESTS PASSED + ALL FRONTEND TESTS PASSED. Blurhash blur placeholders (55 found), CDN image loading (r2.dev), proxy video URLs for CORS safety, preload links, hero autoplay with poster loading, story cards with preview videos all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard.js: resolveMedia() correctly passes proxy paths to components - VERIFIED
Dashboard.js: HeroSection enables preview via enablePreview={true} - VERIFIED
Dashboard.js: StoryCard enables hover/visible preview via enablePreviewOnHover={true} and enablePreviewOnVisible={priority} - VERIFIED
HeroMedia.jsx: HERO_AUTOPLAY_DELAY=1000ms, poster must load before preview starts - VERIFIED
HeroMedia.jsx: Hero poster has loading=eager and fetchPriority=high - VERIFIED
StoryCardMedia.jsx: HOVER_DELAY=120ms for desktop, DEBOUNCE_VIS=150ms for mobile IntersectionObserver - VERIFIED
StoryCardMedia.jsx: Video elements have muted, loop, playsInline attributes - VERIFIED
videoController.js: Singleton controller with max 1 video at a time, max 2 per 5 seconds rate limiting - VERIFIED
videoController.js: trackPreviewEvent() sends analytics to /api/engagement/preview-event - VERIFIED
mediaUrl.js: resolveMediaUrl() CDN-ifies images only, videos use proxy for CORS safety - VERIFIED
engagement.py: POST /api/engagement/preview-event accepts job_id, event_type, watch_time, surface - VERIFIED
engagement.py: Feed API returns cdn_base (R2 public URL) for frontend CDN resolution - VERIFIED
engagement.py: Feed API returns thumb_blur objects with type=inline_base64 in story media - VERIFIED
backfill_blur.py: GET /api/admin/backfill/thumb-blur/status returns missing + done counts - VERIFIED
backfill_blur.py: POST /api/admin/backfill/thumb-blur/sync runs backfill (admin only) - VERIFIED
MediaPreloader.jsx: Creates preload links for hero poster + first 4 thumbnails - VERIFIED
seed_data_creation: None - used existing stories with media
context_for_next_testing_agent: Autoplay preview system fully verified. Key findings: 1) 55 blur placeholders (data:image/jpeg;base64) rendering for zero-blank-UI, 2) Images use CDN (r2.dev) for proper Cache-Control, 3) Videos use proxy URLs (not CDN) for CORS safety, 4) Hero poster has loading=eager and fetchPriority=high, 5) 5 preload links exist for hero + first row images, 6) Video elements have muted, loop, playsInline attributes, 7) Preview event tracking endpoint works for all event types, 8) Backfill status shows 181 done, 134 missing (no source images).

dashboard_loads_with_hero_rows.details: Dashboard container, hero section, metrics strip, story rows, features grid all render

hero_poster_from_cdn.details: Hero poster src contains r2.dev (CDN), not proxy

card_images_from_cdn.details: Card images use CDN (r2.dev) - found 165 story cards with CDN images

card_preview_video_attributes.details: Video elements have muted, loop, playsInline attributes

card_preview_videos_use_proxy.details: Video src uses proxy URL (preview.emergentagent.com/api/media/r2/) NOT CDN for CORS safety

hero_autoplay_after_poster.details: Hero preview video element exists, previewEnabled becomes true after poster loads

preview_event_endpoint.details: POST /api/engagement/preview-event returns success:true for all event types

feed_api_thumb_blur.details: Feed API returns thumb_blur objects with type=inline_base64 in story media

preload_links_exist.details: 5 preload links exist for hero + first row images
